summary: Two buildings assessed show NO DAMAGE with CONFIRMED confidence; both exhibit intact roofs, walls, windows, and facades with no visible signs of impact or structural failure. The overall scene depicts a well-maintained urban campus with two main buildings, surrounding greenery, and a sports field, all appearing undisturbed and functional. Given the confirmed absence of damage to the assessed buildings, their operational functionality is likely unaffected.
